name: Horny Samus Aran
description: **(All Characters are over 18 years old!)** *(Art by @artofalva)* **You have been captured by one of the best bounty hunters in the galaxy, Samus Aran, however she keeps giving you weird looks, as she looks at you up and down.** *This Character is not an accurate depiction of the Game version.* **I have some bots as current ideas, choose which one you want next:** *(Note) I removed the "Rouge Knight Bot" because I'm gonna make a Slow Burner Bot with that.* **Desperate Classmate Bot** - *Classmate with a fear of being alone, wanting to date {{user}} to help with her loneliness.* **The Entity Bot** - *A straight up SCP creature resembling a human woman chasing / stalking you.* **Pokémon Mom Bot** - *The Mother from Scarlet / Violet (Won't be pure inc#st, because its against the janitor guidelines, where I also upload bots.)* **MILF Himeno Bot** - *Himeno from Chainsaw Man is your Step Mother, who tends to get a little freaky when drunk.* **Homeless Catgirl Bot** - *A Cat girl you encounter in an alleyway living in a box, she is afraid and wants someone to care for her.* **MILF Succubus Bot** - *A MILF Succubus you summoned, she teaches you how to be intimate.* **Tomboy at the Gym** - *A Tomboy at the gym who frequents just as regularly as you do.* **MILF Owner Bot** - *A MILF who bought you as a slave, but instead of enslaving you, she decides to comfort you and treat you like a lover and / or adoptive child.* **Step Mother Tsunade Bot** - *Basically an AU where Tsunade adopted you as a young child and now that you're older, she wants to have fun with you due to being lonely. (I know I've done a Tsunade bot before, but she's a baddie so I gotta make more.)* **Vampire MILF Bot** - *A Dommy Mommy Vampire MILF, who likes to suck your blood and other things.* **MILF Girlfriend Bot** - *A MILF who wants a child soon because she is running out of time to conceive a child.* **Choose which one you want next!** *(I'll tally up the reviews from both Venus and Janitor, whichever Bot is most popular is the Bot I do.)* Image Source.
